channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta Faces Antitrust Trial Over Instagram and WhatsApp Acquisitions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) alleges Meta's purchase of Instagram and WhatsApp in 2012 and 2014, respectively, violated competition laws.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Some top tech leaders have embraced Trump. That's created a political divide in Silicon Valley
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Like many in the tech industry, Jeremy Lyons used to think of himself as a relatively apolitical guy.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 5 mobile privacy terms you need to know to protect yourself
item.description: The CyberGuy breaks down five mobile privacy terms that could make a difference when it comes to keeping your personal information safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: El Camino Health implements AI, robots in hospitals to improve efficiency
item.description: Artificial intelligence is now helping doctors and nurses at El Camino Health hospitals monitor patient vital signs, detect illnesses in X-rays and draft doctor's notes and responses for patients.
item.dc:creator: Nollyanne Delacruz, The Mercury News

item.title: The Summer I Turned Pretty season 3: everything we know so far about the hit Prime Video show’s return
item.description: The Summer I Turned Pretty season 3 officially lands in July. Here's everything we know so far about the hit Prime Video show's return including trailer, cast, plot rumors and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: This great free tool brings Pixel-quality image sharpening to any device
item.description: It really is mind-blowing how much incredible stuff we can do with images these days. ’Twasn’t long ago, after all, that advanced image adjustments required pricey desktop-computer software and super-specific knowledge.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Steve Jobs was probably the last beloved tech leader the world will ever have—and that’s a good thing
item.description: Almost 23 years ago, an employee at Apple described Steve Jobs to me as one of the world’s few “rock star CEOs.” At the time, I didn’t understand why anyone would talk about the head of a company in that way.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: More and faster: New proposals changing Python from within
item.description: Top picks for Python readers on InfoWorld Making Python faster won’t be easy, but it’ll be worth it Python’s malleability and dynamism make it powerful, but also very hard to speed up. Here’s a look at some of the ways developers are working to make Python faster from within.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Morocco’s social security database hacked and leaked on Telegram
item.description: Morocco‘s social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Waymo gets stuck in California Chick-fil-A drive-thru
item.description: Videos showed Chick-fil-A workers standing around the stalled vehicle, which had its hazard lights on.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Shopify CEO Orders Employees to Prove AI Can't Handle Work Before Hiring
item.description: Shopify's Tobi Lutke instructs employees to use AI before hiring new staff, citing benefits for employee performance and customer satisfaction
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, NewsNation

item.title: For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet
item.description: Proposed TSA security requirements mark a step in the right direction for ICS/OT security. However, stricter compliance alone isn’t enough. The post For safeguarding critical infrastructure, stronger governance alone isn’t a magic bullet first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network
